allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { Client } = require\('pg'\); const c = new Client\({ connectionString: process.env.DB_CONNECTION_STRING }\); c.connect\(\).then\(async \(\) => { const { rows } = await c.query\('SELECT tipo_insumo, marca, precio_promedio, ml_gr_pieza FROM insumos WHERE precio_promedio = 0 OR precio_promedio IS NULL ORDER BY tipo_insumo, marca'\); rows.forEach\(r => console.log\(r.tipo_insumo + ' — ' + r.marca + ': $' + r.precio_promedio\)\); await c.end\(\); }\);")
